holdings.n: The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation

holdings.infoBox: KCE is an equity ETF with a total of 66 individual holdings. The top holdings are StoneX Group stock at 2.68%, Jefferies Financial Group at 2.26%, Acadian Asset Management at 2.24%, Galaxy Digital at 2.22%, and Virtu Financial at 2.02%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR S&P Capital Markets ETF (KCE) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Capital Markets Select Industry index. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of US capital markets companies, as defined by GICS. KCE was launched on Nov 8, 2005 and is issued by State Street.

data.title: 10 years later: Best and worst performing ETFs
data.text: CNBC's Mike Santoli takes a look back at the best and worst performing ETFs from the past ten years since the financial crisis.
